seo.title: GPT Image 2 AI Image Generator | Try GPT Image 2 Online | LazyKiwi
seo.description: GPT Image 2 by OpenAI generates high-quality images from text prompts. Create realistic photos, illustrations, and art with advanced AI image generation.

hero.headline: Generate High-Quality Images from **Text Prompts**
hero.tagline: OpenAI's advanced image generation model for detailed, accurate visual content creation.
hero.description: GPT Image 2 transforms text descriptions into high-resolution images with improved accuracy and detail. Built on OpenAI's latest diffusion technology, it handles complex prompts, maintains consistent style, and generates photorealistic or artistic images. Ideal for designers, marketers, and creators who need precise visual content without specialized tools or skills.
hero.name: GPT Image 2

steps.title: Three steps from idea to image
steps.description: Transform your creative vision into high-quality images with GPT Image 2 in three straightforward steps.

items.title: Select model and describe image
items.description: Choose GPT Image 2 from the model selector and enter a detailed text prompt describing your desired image, including style, composition, and key elements.
items.image_prompt: Clean web interface screenshot showing GPT Image 2 selected in a dropdown menu at the top, with a large text input field below containing a detailed prompt like 'a serene mountain landscape at sunset with purple sky'. Modern UI with subtle shadows, professional color scheme with blues and grays.

items.title: Configure size and style parameters
items.description: Adjust image dimensions, aspect ratio, style strength, and quality settings using intuitive sliders and dropdown menus to fine-tune your output specifications.
items.image_prompt: UI screenshot showing a configuration panel with multiple parameter controls: aspect ratio selector showing options like 1:1, 16:9, 9:16; image size dropdown with options like 1024x1024, 1792x1024; style intensity slider set at 75%; quality toggle set to 'high'. Clean, organized layout with labels and values clearly visible.

items.title: Generate and download your image
items.description: Click generate to create your image, preview the result in high resolution, and download in your preferred format with one click export.
items.image_prompt: Screenshot showing a generated landscape image displayed in a preview area with a 'Download' button below it. The interface includes format options (PNG, JPG, WEBP) and a 'Generate again' button. The generated image shows the mountain landscape from the prompt, demonstrating successful output. Clean, minimal interface with the image as focal point.

capabilities.title: What sets GPT Image 2 apart
capabilities.description: GPT Image 2 delivers photorealistic image generation with unprecedented accuracy in text rendering, spatial relationships, and fine details. Built on advanced diffusion architecture, it understands complex prompts and produces consistent, high-fidelity outputs across diverse styles and subjects.

items.title: Perfect text in every generated image
items.description: GPT Image 2 accurately renders text within images, from storefront signs to book covers. The model understands typography, spacing, and context, eliminating the garbled text problem that plagued earlier image generators.
items.image_prompt: A modern coffee shop storefront with a neon sign reading 'BREW & BYTES CAFE' above the entrance, menu boards with clearly legible text showing drink names and prices, and a chalkboard in the window with 'TODAY'S SPECIAL: Caramel Latte' written in perfect cursive, photorealistic style, golden hour lighting

items.title: Lifelike textures and natural lighting physics
items.description: Advanced understanding of materials, surfaces, and light behavior produces images indistinguishable from photographs. The model captures subsurface scattering, reflections, and texture detail at a level that rivals professional photography and 3D rendering.
items.image_prompt: Close-up portrait of a person with water droplets on their face, showing detailed skin texture, individual water beads with realistic refraction, natural daylight creating soft shadows, visible pores and fine hairs, shallow depth of field with bokeh background, professional photography quality

items.title: Complex scenes with accurate perspective and depth
items.description: GPT Image 2 maintains consistent geometry and spatial relationships across the entire frame. It handles multi-object compositions, architectural accuracy, and depth perception without the distortions or impossible geometry common in earlier models.
items.image_prompt: Interior of a modern architectural library with three floors visible, spiral staircase connecting levels, bookshelves lining curved walls, people on different floors shown in correct perspective, natural light streaming through tall windows, accurate depth of field showing foreground, middle ground, and background in proper scale

items.title: Precise control over composition and details
items.description: The model interprets complex, multi-part prompts with high fidelity, accurately following instructions about composition, style, mood, and specific details. It understands nuanced requests and maintains consistency across all specified elements.
items.image_prompt: Split composition showing the same medieval castle: left half in bright daylight with blue sky and green grass, right half at sunset with orange sky and long shadows, maintaining identical architecture and perspective across both halves, photorealistic rendering, seamless transition in the middle

faq.question: What is GPT Image 2?
faq.answer: GPT Image 2 is OpenAI's AI image generation model that creates high-quality images from text descriptions. It produces more realistic and detailed visuals than its predecessor, with improved understanding of complex prompts and better handling of text within images.

faq.question: Is GPT Image 2 free to use?
faq.answer: GPT Image 2 is available through OpenAI's API with pay-per-use pricing. ChatGPT Plus and Team subscribers get limited free generations monthly. Pricing varies by resolution and quality settings, typically ranging from $0.020 to $0.120 per image depending on size.

faq.question: How does GPT Image 2 compare to DALL-E 3?
faq.answer: GPT Image 2 offers enhanced photorealism and better prompt adherence than DALL-E 3. It generates more accurate text rendering, improved spatial relationships, and finer details. Both models excel at creative tasks, but GPT Image 2 typically produces more consistent results across varied styles.

faq.question: Can GPT Image 2 edit existing images?
faq.answer: Yes, GPT Image 2 supports inpainting and outpainting, allowing you to modify specific areas of existing images or extend image boundaries. You can upload an image, specify the area to change, and provide a text prompt describing desired modifications.

faq.question: How do I access GPT Image 2?
faq.answer: Access GPT Image 2 through ChatGPT (Plus/Team/Enterprise), OpenAI's API, or the OpenAI platform directly. In ChatGPT, simply describe the image you want. For API access, integrate using OpenAI's image generation endpoints with your API key and preferred programming language.

bottomCta.title: Create AI Images with GPT Image 2
bottomCta.description: Generate high-quality images from text descriptions using GPT Image 2. Fast, accurate, and accessible through our intuitive interface with flexible API access.
